title: Marble burying test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"856a2","text":"Protocol for marble burying test performed by rats","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"46nha","text":"All procedures were carried out following the guidelines on the ethical use of animals from the Council Directive of the European Communities (2010/63/EU) and were approved by the Italian Ministry of Health","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place a rat in a novel cage (43 cm X 26 cm X 20 cm) containing 5 cm of regular bedding andfifteen marbles (15 mm diameter) and left undisturbed for 20 min
Estimate the number of marbles buried by considering buried a marble covered ≥ 2/3 with bedding
Leave the rats in the behavioral room for acclimation for at least 1 hour before the test, and perform the marble burying test between 9:00 am and 16:00 pm.
creator: Ada Ledonne
